metadata.title: Annotator
metadata.description: This is a sample plugin for Obsidian. It allows you to open and annotate PDF and EPUB files.

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to use annotation mode by default when opening a note with annotation-target")
regex.target: .setDesc("在打开带有注释目标的笔记时，默认是否使用注释模式")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to include the %%PREFIX%% region of the annotation markdown. Allows you to see some text before the highlighted region.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否包含注释markdown中的 %%PREFIX%%  允许你在高亮区域前看到一些文本。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The amount of sepia in dark mode")
.setDesc("The amount of contrast in dark mode")
.setDesc("The amount of brightness in dark mode")
.setDesc("Not bundled with the plugin due to potential copyright issues.")
regex.target: .setDesc("由于潜在的版权问题，未捆绑在插件中。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If this is enabled, more things are printed to the console.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用此选项，将有更多内容打印到控制台。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to include the %%POSTFIX%% region of the annotation markdown. Allows you to see some text after the highlighted region.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否包含注释markdown中的 %%POSTFIX%%区域。允许你查看高亮区域后的部分文本。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to wrap the %%HIGHLIGHT%% region text in == ==, so that the text becomes highlighted. Useful for distinguishing the highlight from the pre- and postfix.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否将 %%HIGHLIGHT%% 区域用 == == 包裹, 以高亮文本。这对于区分高亮部分与前后缀很有用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to use dark mode by default when opening pdfs/epubs.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否在打开PDF/EPUB时默认使用深色模式。")

regex.source: Notice("Annotator: Could not fetch Annotate.TV resource zip")

regex.target: .log("请求体既不是字符串也不是null: ",r.body)

regex.source: .log("Failed to handle hypothesis drag-and-drop annotation event: ",e)
regex.target: .log("处理假设拖放注释事件失败: ",e)

regex.source: .error("No video annotation website found. Make sure that you have provided a valid zip file in the annotator config.")
regex.target: .error("未找到视频注释网站。请确保在注释器配置中提供了有效的zip文件。")
.error("结束标签名: "+E+" 可能不完整")

regex.source: .error("setting end offset to start container length failed",e)
regex.target: .error("设置结束偏移量为开始容器长度失败",e)

regex.source: .error("Couldn't convert value into a JSON string: ",e)
.error("This browser doesn't support requestAnimationFrame. Make sure that you load a polyfill in older browsers. https://reactjs.org/link/react-polyfills")
regex.target: .error("此浏览器不支持requestAnimationFrame。请确保在旧版浏览器中加载polyfill。https://reactjs.org/link/react-polyfills")

regex.source: .error("This browser doesn't support cancelAnimationFrame. Make sure that you load a polyfill in older browsers. https://reactjs.org/link/react-polyfills")
regex.target: .error("此浏览器不支持cancelAnimationFrame。请确保在旧版浏览器中加载polyfill。https://reactjs.org/link/react-polyfills")

regex.source: .error("forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported")
regex.target: .error("forceFrameRate需要0到125之间的正整数，不支持强制设置高于125 fps的帧率")

regex.source: .setDesc(["If the provided annotation target is not found, ","Annotator will try prepending this string to the path. ","This can be useful if, for example, all your notes are ","located at a specific remote location."
regex.target: .setDesc(["如果未找到所提供的注释目标，","Annotator 将尝试在路径前加上该字符串。","例如，如果您的所有笔记都是","位于特定远程位置。"
